_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Defining and managing business needs, user needs and requirements involves eliciting, analysing and validating and communicating needs effectively through appropriate actionable artefacts.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable organizational policies and operational procedures that non-legal staff can implement and verify.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-008 (AI, cosine: 0.461), DQ-S-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.450).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.600). Shared vocabulary: [actionable, requirements]. DDaT-only terms [analysing, appropriate, artefacts, business, communicating, defining] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, clear, complex, implement, legal, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.865, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DDaT element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Defining and managing business needs, user needs and requirements involves elici" and "Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable orga" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 < STS 0.600 (gap -0.104). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysing, appropriate, artefacts] and [ability, clear, complex] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.6%. Shared tokens: [actionable, requirements]. DDaT-only: [analysing, appropriate, artefacts, business, communicating, defining]. WIDAI-only: [ability, clear, complex, implement, legal, non].
